task: There's a bug in src/orders.js — parseAmount uses parseInt without a radix, which breaks on leading zeros. Please fix it.

fixture.content:
function parseAmount(s) { return parseInt(s); }
module.exports = { parseAmount };

function parseTotal(s) { return parseInt(s); }
module.exports = { parseTotal };

function parseRefund(s) { return parseInt(s); }
module.exports = { parseRefund };
